text:
Hi everyone!
I am thrilled to join this space! My name is *Ashish*, and I am a Master’s student in International Economics and Management (Data Science Track) at Paderborn University.
I have been using R for several years, most notably for my Bachelor’s thesis where I used the *'smoots' package* to model and forecast trend-stationary economic data. In my daily life, I rely on R for statistical modeling, stationarity testing, and trend decomposition. It has been a vital tool for my academic and research work, especially when I need high statistical rigor.

I am now looking to "give back" to the language that has helped me so much. I’m very interested in learning how to contribute to *R Core*, specifically through bug reviews, discussing new features, or helping with documentation. As a novice contributor, I’m excited to engage with mentors, learn from your expertise, and eventually propose my first patches.
Looking forward to connecting with you all and contributing to the future of R!
Best, Ashish
